project_type: Next.js 14 monorepo with App Router, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, shadcn/ui
verification_instructions: TypeScript compilation check via tsc --noEmit in apps/web
setup_instructions: npm install from root, then cd apps/web for web development
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full network access available
key_patterns: Server components with async data fetching, client components marked with 'use client', Prisma ORM for database, framer-motion for animations, lucide-react for icons, formatCurrency from lib/utils for money display
directory_structure: Monorepo: apps/web (Next.js customer+admin), apps/mobile-staff (Expo), apps/mobile-customer (Expo), apps/mobile-delivery (Expo). Web app uses App Router with nested layouts. Admin has its own layout at apps/web/app/admin/layout.tsx.
